name: Baked Orzo with Kalamata Olives and Fresh Her
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
1/2 cup chopped fresh herbs (e.g., parsley, basil, oregano)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Cook onions until tender.
2. Add orzo to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Stir in olives and add 2 cups of chicken stock. Bring to a boil.
4. Simmer for 5 minutes and then add 2 more cups of chicken stock. Return to a boil.
5. Pour into a butter baking dish. Cover with foil.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes, stirring once. If needed, add more stock and continue baking until orzo is tender.
7. Sprinkle with fresh chopped herbs and serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
